name: python-refactor
description: Agentic Python codebase analysis suite. Skills: python-refactor:orchestrate (full pipeline), python-refactor:measure (static analysis via radon/vulture/bandit/semgrep/skylos/pydeps), python-refactor:hunt-bugs (bug exploration + Hypothesis PBT), python-refactor:architecture (deep-module analysis + GitHub RFCs), python-refactor:plan-refactor (prioritized refactor plan). Run python-refactor:orchestrate to chain all phases automatically, or invoke any skill individually.
